scope: All completed matches with both pre-match prediction files and final postmatch result files available locally as of 2026-06-22.

sample_policy.included: Matches with a local pre-match prediction and a local final-score postmatch review.
excluded: Completed matches without a matching pre-match prediction file.
Duplicate earlier drafts when a later pre-match revision exists.
sample_policy.prediction_version_policy: Use the latest available pre-match version for the same fixture; when a quant revision exists before kickoff, it supersedes the older prose prediction.

major_error_types.description: Model missed several low-event or strategically acceptable draws, especially early group-stage matches.
Red cards, early goals, goalkeeper overperformance and late collapse were not strong enough as tail multipliers.
Strong favorites were directionally correct but large-win tails were too thin after an early breakthrough.
The highest single scoreline can be a draw while aggregate 1X2 probability still favors one side; future reports must separate these concepts.

data_quality_limits: Older predictions often lack a formal top5 scoreline list.
Some early predictions were prose-first and not full quant-chain outputs.
Several postmatch files have partial player-state updates because full official minutes and same-source external ratings were unavailable.

optimization_targets.required_reporting_standard: Every future prediction must include xG, 0-0 through 5-5 Poisson matrix, tail probability, top5 scorelines, 1X2, totals, market delta, red-team status and postmatch error fields.

handoff_files.execution_summary: 汇总/模型优化执行方案_20260622.md
